full_text: Mosaddek Hossain to Muzarabani, no run, he can't! And Mosaddek Hossain keeps his cool. Bangladesh win. Hang on! Will they check for any other thing this time? No. Fullish and across Muzarabani who heaves and misses, Nurul takes it behind and that's it. Muzarabani closes his eyes in disappointment. Swung too hard and did not connect.

short_text: Mosaddek Hossain to Muzarabani, , he can't and Bangladesh win. Mosaddek Hossain keeps his cool and fires this flat and a
full_text: Mosaddek Hossain to Muzarabani, , he can't and Bangladesh win. Mosaddek Hossain keeps his cool and fires this flat and angles it across Muzarabani from round the wicket, a swing and a miss, the back foot is out and Nurul does the rest. Zimbabwe fall just short. Hang on! Hang on! This is too good to be true! The players shook hands after the stumping and went to their dugouts after that. But the third umpire has been called into action and Nurul's gloves were definitely in front of the stumps when he took it. So it's a no-ball. Now a free-hit and Zimbabwe need 4 off this delivery. Muzarabani is back on strike. Unreal scenes here at the Gabba. What scenes. Celebrations and devastation on both sides. But how cool were Erasmus and Nitin Menon who asked it to be checked. This is hard to believe stuff

full_text: Mosaddek Hossain to Ngarava, Stumped!! Well bowled and Ngarava is gone. Ngarava is devastated as he swipes the bat at thin air in frustration. What.A.Game! Now Zimbabwe need 5 off 1. Four for the Super Over.
